+
+#include "jni.h"
+#include <sys/stat.h>
+
+// If the file descriptor is a PIPE, return the INode.
+JNIEXPORT jlong JNICALL
+Java_LinuxFDInfo_getPipeInodeNum(JNIEnv *env, jclass cls, jint fd) {
+#ifdef S_ISFIFO
+    struct stat buf;
+    if  (fstat(fd, &buf) != -1 && S_ISFIFO(buf.st_mode)) {
+        return buf.st_ino;
+    }
+#endif
+    return 0;
+}
